title: adenostemma brasilianum
intro: Adenostemma brasilianum, also known as Brazilian buttonbush or Brazilian button weed, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adenostemma brasilianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
